launcher_settings.title: Launcher Settings
launcher_settings.subtitle: Configure your launcher preferences
launcher_settings.general.title: General Options
launcher_settings.general.hide_app_to_tray.label: Minimize application
launcher_settings.general.hide_app_to_tray.description: Hide application to system tray instead of completely closing.

launcher_settings.downloads.speed_limit.label: Download Speed Limit (KB/s)
launcher_settings.downloads.speed_limit.description: Limit the total download bandwidth. Set to 0 for unlimited.
launcher_settings.files.default_game_path.label: Default Game Install Location
launcher_settings.files.default_game_path.description: Default base directory where new games will be installed.
launcher_settings.files.xxmi_path.label: XXMI Location
launcher_settings.files.xxmi_path.description: Directory for XXMI modding tool files.
launcher_settings.files.fps_unlock_path.label: FPS Unlocker Location
launcher_settings.files.fps_unlock_path.description: Directory where the FPS unlocker is stored.

game_settings.general.title: General Configuration
game_settings.general.install_location.label: Install Location
game_settings.general.install_location.description: Directory where the game is installed.
game_settings.general.skip_version_checks.label: Skip Version Checks
game_settings.general.skip_version_checks.description_: Updates are managed by Steam for this installation.
game_settings.general.skip_hash_validation.label: Skip Hash Validation
game_settings.general.skip_hash_validation.description: Skip file verification during repairs (faster but less safe).
game_settings.general.discord_rpc.label: DiscordRPC
game_settings.general.discord_rpc.description: Show Discord rich presence activity while you are playing the game.
game_settings.launch.title: Launch Configuration
game_settings.launch.prevent_idle.label: Prevent Idle
game_settings.launch.prevent_idle.description: Prevents system from going to idle/screenlock state while playing the game.
game_settings.launch.graphics_api.label: Graphics API
game_settings.launch.graphics_api.description: Graphics API the game will use.
game_settings.launch.args.label: Launch Arguments
game_settings.launch.args.description: Additional arguments passed to the game executable.
game_settings.launch.env_vars.label: Environment Variables
game_settings.launch.env_vars.description: Environment variables set for the game process.
game_settings.launch.pre_launch_cmd.label: Pre-Launch Command
game_settings.launch.pre_launch_cmd.description: Command executed before the game starts.
game_settings.launch.custom_launch_cmd.label: Custom Launch Command
game_settings.launch.help.var.appid: Get designated appid to pass to reaper argument
game_settings.launch.help.var.runner_dir: Path of current runner (not a binary, you can append any binary from this folder)
game_settings.launch.help.var.prefix: Path to root of runner prefix location field
game_settings.launch.help.var.install_dir: Path to game install location field
game_settings.launch.help.var.steamrt_path: Path to SteamLinuxRuntime folder (you can append other binaries from the folder)
game_settings.launch.help.var.command: Default launch command useful for command wrapping tools
game_settings.xxmi.title: XXMI Configuration
game_settings.xxmi.enable.label: Enable XXMI
game_settings.xxmi.enable.description: Enable and inject the XXMI modding tool.
game_settings.xxmi.show_warnings.label: Show Warnings
game_settings.xxmi.show_warnings.description: Show mod parse warnings for debugging broken mods.
game_settings.xxmi.dump_shaders.label: Dump Shaders
game_settings.xxmi.dump_shaders.description: Enable shader dumping for mod development.
game_settings.xxmi.hunting_mode.label: Hunting Mode
game_settings.xxmi.hunting_mode.description: Choose how XXMI hunting mode behaves.
game_settings.fps_unlocker.title: FPS Unlocker Configuration
game_settings.fps_unlocker.enable.label: Enable FPS Unlocker
game_settings.fps_unlocker.enable.description: Load and inject frame-rate unlocking into the game.
game_settings.fps_unlocker.target.label: FPS Target
game_settings.fps_unlocker.not_available: FPS Unlocker is not available for this installation.

game_settings.uninstall.title: Danger Zone
game_settings.uninstall.name: Uninstall Installation
game_settings.uninstall.description: This removes the selected installation permanently. Use review first to verify exactly what will be deleted.
game_settings.uninstall.delete_files: - Game installation files for this install
game_settings.uninstall.delete_prefix_toggle.label: Delete prefix
game_settings.uninstall.delete_prefix_toggle.descripti: Also remove the Wine/Proton prefix associated with this installation.
game_settings.uninstall.keep_game_data.label: Keep game data
game_settings.uninstall.keep_game_data.description: Do not delete game data if you want to import somewhere else.
game_settings.uninstall.acknowledge.label: I Understand This Is Permanent

install_game.runner_version.description: Select the Wine/Proton version to download with the game.

network.no_internet_message: Unable to connect to the internet. You can continue with limited functionality - you'll be able to launch installed games but won't be able to download or update.
network.slow_internet_message: Your internet connection appears to be slow. Downloads and updates may take longer than expected. You can continue with limited functionality or retry the connection.
network.connection_lost_message:
Your internet connection was lost. Some features like downloads and updates won't be available until the connection is restored.

The launcher will automatically reconnect when possible.

app.update_available_banner: New version of TwintailLauncher available! Please update for the best experience!

dialogs.gamemode_not_found:

Install the `gamemode` package or equivalent from your distro to use this feature.

Please download one of the supported minimum runner versions or higher!
Game will not start until this requirement is satisfied!

dialogs.launch_runner_version_required:
Launching {install_name} with {runner_version} could lead to various issues.
Please change your runner to at minimum {required_runner} and try again!
Game will not start until this requirement is satisfied!
